vBRIEFInfo.description: Specification vBRIEF for AtariTest. Source of truth for SPECIFICATION.md (Full path interview strategy).

narratives.Overview: AtariTest is a 4KB NTSC Atari 2600 ROM, written in 6502 assembly and built with DASM, that demonstrates two-joystick control: each joystick drives a sprite with acceleration/friction movement and can fire a single-pixel missile in any of 8 directions. A title screen displays "TEST GAME" on power-on; pressing fire on either joystick starts gameplay. Verification is via Stella on macOS. See PRD.md for goals, requirements, and decisions.
narratives.Architecture:
Single-bank 4KB cartridge layout, NO bankswitching. Standard 2-line kernel with NTSC timing (262 scanlines/frame, 60Hz). Source is organized by concern under src/: main.s (entry/reset/NMI vectors), kernel.s (vertical sync/blank, visible kernel, overscan), title.s (title-screen state and PF0/PF1/PF2 letter data for "TEST GAME"), input.s (joystick + INPT4/INPT5 fire button reading, edge-detect helpers), movement.s (per-player position, velocity, acceleration, friction, screen-bound clamping), missile.s (per-player missile state: active flag, x/y, dx/dy, edge despawn), collision.s (CXM0P/CXM1P latch handling, hit-flash state machine), and gamestate.s (TITLE -> PLAY transition).

Memory map (zero-page RAM): GameState (0=TITLE,1=PLAY), P0X, P0Y, P0VX, P0VY, P1X, P1Y, P1VX, P1VY (signed fixed-point: high byte position, low byte fraction), P0FireEdge, P1FireEdge, M0Active, M0X, M0Y, M0DX, M0DY, M1Active, M1X, M1Y, M1DX, M1DY, P0FlashCount, P1FlashCount, FrameCounter. ROM constants: PFCOLOR_TITLE, P0COLOR, P1COLOR, FLASH_COLOR, MAX_SPEED, ACCEL, FRICTION, MISSILE_SPEED, FLASH_FRAMES, PLAYFIELD_LEFT/RIGHT/TOP/BOTTOM.

Frame loop: VSYNC (3 LN) -> VBLANK (37 LN) [read SWCHA/INPT4/INPT5, update game state per GameState, compute fine-position registers HMP0/HMP1/HMM0/HMM1, set GRP0/GRP1 patterns, set COLUP0/COLUP1 with flash override] -> visible kernel (192 LN) [TITLE: PF-only TEST GAME banner; PLAY: 2-LN kernel rendering P0/P1 sprites + M0/M1 missiles] -> overscan (30 LN) [edge despawn missiles, decrement flash counters, update edge-detect state]. Movement uses 8-bit position + 8-bit fractional accumulator; acceleration/friction applied in VBLANK; clamp to playfield bounds before WSYNC. Missiles use sign-magnitude DX/DY (-MISSILE_SPEED..+MISSILE_SPEED) and despawn at any bound. Collisions read CXM0P (M0 vs P1) and CXM1P (M1 vs P0); on hit, set the hit player's flash counter to FLASH_FRAMES and clear the missile.
narratives.ProblemStatement: Demonstrate independent two-player joystick control on the Atari 2600: each joystick drives a sprite with momentum-based movement and can fire a missile in any of 8 directions, with a title screen and a runnable ROM produced via DASM. Acts as a controls and build-pipeline proof of concept rather than a full game.
narratives.Goals: G1 -- Produce a 4KB NTSC ROM `build/ataritest.bin` built via DASM. G2 -- TEST GAME title screen on power-on; transition to gameplay on either fire button. G3 -- Taskfile-driven single-command build. G4 -- Manual smoke-test verification in Stella on macOS. Non-goals (v1): sound, score/HUD, lives, levels, AI opponents, game-over, save state, PAL, bankswitching, ROM > 4KB, scoring/respawn on hit.
narratives.UserStories: US1 Move sprite via joystick with momentum. US2 Fire missile in joystick direction (8-way). US3 Edge-triggered fire (no auto-fire on hold). US4 See TEST GAME title on power-on. US5 Either fire button starts the game. US6 Build ROM with one command. US7 Run ROM in Stella on macOS.
narratives.Requirements: Functional: FR-1 Title screen with PF "TEST GAME" on reset. FR-2 Either fire button transitions title -> play. FR-3 Title does not transition on direction-only input. FR-4 Each joystick maps to one sprite. FR-5 Held direction accelerates sprite to MAX_SPEED. FR-6 Released direction applies FRICTION toward 0. FR-7 Sprites clamp to NTSC playfield bounds. FR-8 Players differ by COLOR ONLY. FR-9 At most one active missile per player. FR-10 Edge-triggered fire only. FR-11 No fire when joystick is centered. FR-12 8-way missile direction. FR-13 Missile is a 1-pixel TIA missile. FR-14 Missile despawns at edge. FR-15 Hit on opponent triggers brief flash; play continues; missile consumed. FR-16 No score/lives/reset on hit. FR-17 `task build` invokes DASM. FR-18 Output is `build/ataritest.bin`. FR-19 4KB single-bank, no bankswitching. Non-functional: NFR-1 NTSC 60Hz stable (262 LN). NFR-2 Loads/runs in latest stable Stella on macOS. NFR-3 ROM <= 4KB. NFR-4 Reproducible byte-identical builds for fixed DASM version. NFR-5 macOS DASM install steps documented. NFR-6 Source organized by concern with subroutine comments.
narratives.EdgeCases: Diagonal input + fire: missile uses 8-way snapped direction. Joystick centered + fire pressed: no missile. Fire held: only first edge fires; subsequent presses require release. Sprite at boundary + accelerating outward: velocity clamped, position clamped. Missile collides with both opponent sprite and edge in same frame: collision wins (flash + despawn). Both players fire same frame: both missiles spawn independently. Missile spawned at sprite center; edge despawn after position update. Flash counter active when struck again: refresh counter (do not stack).
narratives.TechDecisions: D-1 4KB no bankswitching. D-2 Hit -> brief flash, play continues. D-3 1 missile/player. D-4 Acceleration + friction + max-speed cap (fixed-point Q8.8 per axis). D-5 8-way fire direction. D-6 Edge despawn for missiles. D-7 NTSC-first (60Hz). D-8 Edge-triggered firing. D-9 Color-only player differentiation. D-10 DASM via `task build` -> `build/ataritest.bin`. D-11 Stella manual smoke test on macOS. D-12 Out-of-scope: sound, score/HUD, levels, AI, game-over, save state.
narratives.PreImplementationGates: Toolchain: DASM installed and on PATH (`dasm -v`). Stella installed on macOS for verification. `task` (go-task) available. Project Taskfile.yml created with `build` target. Git repository initialized. PRD.md approved (DONE). specification.vbrief.json status flipped to `approved` before SPECIFICATION.md is rendered.
narratives.SuccessMetrics: SM-1 `task build` produces `build/ataritest.bin` exactly 4096 bytes. SM-2 ROM shows stable TEST GAME title in Stella at 60Hz. SM-3 Either fire transitions to play reliably. SM-4 Each joystick independently moves sprite with visible accel/friction; sprites stay on-screen. SM-5 8-way missile firing, 1 active per player, despawns at edge. SM-6 Hit on opponent triggers visible flash; play continues. SM-7 All 12 locked decisions reflected in implementation.

narrative.Description: Establish DASM toolchain on macOS, project directory layout, Taskfile, and a minimal kernel that boots in Stella with a black screen.
narrative.Traces: FR-17, FR-18, FR-19, NFR-1, NFR-2, NFR-5

items.title: Install and document DASM on macOS

narrative.Description: Document DASM install (Homebrew preferred) in README.md or PROJECT.md; verify `dasm -v` runs.
narrative.Acceptance: DASM is installed; `dasm -v` prints a version; install steps in repo docs.

narrative.Description: Create src/ with placeholder main.s, include/ for vcs.h/macro.h headers, build/ as DASM output dir, .gitignore for build/.
narrative.Acceptance: Directory tree exists; src/main.s assembles to a 4KB binary even if it only does VSYNC/VBLANK.

narrative.Description: Project-root Taskfile.yml with `build` task that invokes DASM (`dasm src/main.s -f3 -obuild/ataritest.bin -lbuild/ataritest.lst -sbuild/ataritest.sym`), plus `clean` and `run` (Stella) helpers.
narrative.Acceptance: `task build` produces `build/ataritest.bin` (any size) without error; `task clean` removes build/.

items.title: Boot a black screen in Stella

narrative.Description: Implement minimal kernel: VSYNC, VBLANK (37 LN), 192 LN visible (all background color), 30 LN overscan; reset/NMI/IRQ vectors at $FFFC.
narrative.Acceptance: Loading build/ataritest.bin in Stella shows a stable black NTSC frame, no rolling, ROM exactly 4096 bytes.

narrative.Description: Render TEST GAME via playfield registers and add a TITLE -> PLAY state transition gated on either fire button.

items.title: Define GameState and frame loop branching

narrative.Description: Add GameState zero-page byte (TITLE=0, PLAY=1). VBLANK reads INPT4/INPT5 and transitions to PLAY on edge-press of either. Visible kernel branches on GameState.
narrative.Acceptance: ROM still boots; pressing fire on either joystick changes GameState (verify in Stella debugger).

narrative.Description: Build per-line PF data tables for letters T E S T (space) G A M E using mirrored playfield. PF color = PFCOLOR_TITLE; background dark.
narrative.Acceptance: Stella shows centered, readable TEST GAME on title screen at 60Hz with no rolling.

narrative.Description: Render two color-distinct sprites and implement acceleration/friction/clamping movement model driven by SWCHA.
narrative.Traces: FR-4, FR-5, FR-6, FR-7, FR-8, NFR-1

narrative.Description: Define an 8x8 (or 8x16) sprite bitmap used for both players. 2-line kernel sets HMP0/HMP1 fine positions, GRP0/GRP1 patterns, COLUP0/COLUP1 colors.
narrative.Acceptance: Both sprites render simultaneously in PLAY state, stable, with distinct colors and identical shape.

narrative.Description: Read SWCHA: bits 7-4 P0 (right,left,down,up active-low), 3-0 P1. Apply ACCEL on held axis, FRICTION on released axis, clamp |V|<=MAX_SPEED. Use Q8.8 fixed point.
narrative.Acceptance: Each sprite accelerates smoothly when joystick is held and decelerates to a stop when released; speed visibly capped.

narrative.Description: Clamp X to PLAYFIELD_LEFT..PLAYFIELD_RIGHT and Y to PLAYFIELD_TOP..PLAYFIELD_BOTTOM after position update. Zero outward velocity at boundary.
narrative.Acceptance: Sprites cannot leave the visible playfield in any direction; no jitter or wrap-around.

narrative.Description: Implement per-player single-active missile, fired only on fire-button press edges with non-neutral joystick, traveling in 8-way direction, despawning at screen edge.
Maintain prior-frame fire-pressed bits per player; fire 'edge' = pressed-now AND not-pressed-prev.
narrative.Acceptance: Holding fire produces only one edge per press; debug counter ticks once per press in Stella.

narrative.Description: On fire edge, if joystick non-neutral and missile not active, set Mx/My to player center, set DX/DY in {-MISSILE_SPEED, 0, +MISSILE_SPEED} from joystick state, set MxActive=1.
narrative.Acceptance: All 8 joystick directions produce a missile in that direction; centered joystick + fire produces no missile; only 1 active per player.

items.title: Render missile as a single dot and update each frame

narrative.Description: ENAM0/ENAM1=1 when active; NUSIZx missile width=1; per-frame Mx/My += DX/DY; positional update via HMM0/HMM1 fine motion.
narrative.Acceptance: Each player can fire a single-pixel missile that travels visibly in the chosen direction.

narrative.Description: When MxX or MxY crosses playfield bounds, set MxActive=0 and ENAMx=0.
narrative.Acceptance: Missiles disappear cleanly at screen edges; new missile can be fired immediately after.

narrative.Description: Detect M0-vs-P1 and M1-vs-P0 collisions; trigger brief color flash on the hit player; consume the missile; do NOT modify score/lives/state.
In overscan, read CXM0P (bit 7 = M0 vs P1) and CXM1P (bit 7 = M1 vs P0). CXCLR at end of frame.
narrative.Acceptance: Debug output / breakpoint shows the relevant bit set on contact between missile and opposing player sprite.

items.title: Apply hit flash and missile consumption

narrative.Description: On hit, set hit player's PxFlashCount=FLASH_FRAMES and clear MxActive/ENAMx. While PxFlashCount>0, override COLUPx=FLASH_COLOR and decrement once per frame.
narrative.Acceptance: Striking opposite player produces visible brief flash; play continues; missile is consumed; no score/state changes.

narrative.Description: Verify ROM size, byte-reproducibility, NTSC stability, and document smoke-test checklist.
narrative.Traces: NFR-1, NFR-2, NFR-3, NFR-4, NFR-6, SM-1..SM-7

narrative.Description: Confirm `task build` produces exactly 4096-byte ROM with deterministic hash on a pinned DASM; document DASM version.
narrative.Acceptance: `stat -f %z build/ataritest.bin` = 4096; two consecutive `task clean && task build` produce identical SHA-256.

items.title: NTSC stability and Stella smoke test checklist

narrative.Description: Document smoke-test steps in README: open Stella -> load ROM -> verify TEST GAME title -> fire from each joystick -> move both sprites -> fire missiles in all 8 directions -> hit flash -> verify no rolling.
narrative.Acceptance: Checklist passes manually; SM-2..SM-7 all observed; capture screenshots in docs/.

decisions.D2: Player-on-player hit: brief flash, play continues
decisions.D11: Stella manual smoke test on macOS
decisions.D12: Out-of-scope (v1): sound, score/HUD, levels, AI, game-over, save state
